todos.description:
Stuffed penguin plush toy, 11 inches tall. For kids. Cute appearance 
Filled with soft and fluffy PP cotton. Special color makes the stuffed penguin plush look more delicate and texture bring this penguin to life.
Brings comfort and security to young children. It's a good friend for your child, not just a toy.
Hand-poured soy candle with notes of sea salt, driftwood, and glacial mist. Burns 40hrs.
Sustainably sourced Antarctic silverfish, vacuum sealed for freshness. 200g per pack.
Insulated polar jacket rated to -40°C, windproof shell, reinforced seams. Unisex sizing.
Framed 8x10 archival quality photo print of the Ross Ice Shelf at golden hour.
Double-wall insulated 20oz tumbler. Keeps drinks cold 24hrs, hot 12hrs. BPA-free lid.
Set of 5 enamel pins featuring King, Emperor, Rockhopper, Chinstrap, and Gentoo penguins.

todos.task: Life on Ice Coffee Table Book
todos.description: 256-page hardcover book of stunning Antarctic wildlife photography by award-winning photographers.
Lightweight aluminium frame sled rated to 120kg. Compact folding design for easy transport.
Artisan soap bar infused with kelp extract and sea minerals. Cold-pressed, 120g, vegan.
400ml penguin-shaped ceramic mug with sculpted handle. Microwave and dishwasher safe.
100% Merino wool mittens with embroidered penguin motif on the cuff. One size fits most.
Detailed 24x36 inch wall map of Antarctica with geographic labels. Matte laminated finish.
Compact fog-proof and waterproof binoculars. Wide field of view, ideal for penguin watching.
Set of 6 stainless steel penguin cookie cutters in assorted sizes. Dishwasher safe.
Chunky knit scarf in glacier white, 100% Merino wool, 180cm long. Handmade in Iceland.
40L waterproof backpack with padded straps, chest clip, and exclusive penguin patch.
Original watercolor illustration of a Gentoo penguin family, signed 11x14 archival print.
Double-layered expedition tent rated to -30°C. Freestanding design, stakes included. 3.2kg.
90-capsule supply of pure Antarctic krill oil. High-potency EPA & DHA, no fishy aftertaste.
